titleZh: AI 项目选型：什么时候用 Skill、Workflow 和 Agent
titleEn: AI Project Architecture: When to Use Skill, Workflow, and Agent
introZh: 从产品经理视角拆解 AI 项目里的三种能力层级：Skill 负责稳定动作，Workflow 负责流程控制，Agent 负责动态判断。重点不是把所有东西做成 Agent，而是判断哪一层需要智能、哪一层需要确定性、哪一层必须审计和兜底。
introEn: A PM-oriented framework for deciding between Skill, Workflow, and Agent in AI products: use Skills for deterministic actions, Workflows for controlled processes, and Agents for dynamic judgment.
